geometry.note: Topology is exact. Hook controls and handles were already correct; invalidating imported pre-deformation tangent/normal frames after Hooks and Set Curve Handle Positions lets Curve to Mesh derive the current frame and removes the dominant bounds error.

normalGraph.topology: Generated -> Mapping -> 3D Smooth F1 Voronoi -> identity Map Range -> Greater Than 0.5 -> Bump

browser.implementation: strict graph recognizer plus MeshPhysicalMaterial shader injection
browser.approximation: independently expressed 3D Worley cell jitter and exponential smooth minimum; Three.js derivative bump and PBR lighting
browser.webglCompile: pass; no browser console warnings or errors

result: exact topology and authored material constants; near-exact bounds and explicit Smooth-F1/renderer approximation
note: The browser implementation intentionally does not copy Blender renderer source or claim exact Blender Voronoi scalar parity.
